mapper.update: update adminflowers set product_name = #{flowersAdd.GoodsItem}, category = #{flowersAdd.GoodsSort}, price = #{flowersAdd.GoodsPrice}, number = #{flowersAdd.GoodsNumber}, sales_count = #{flowersAdd.SalesNumber}, status = #{flowersAdd.status}, created_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, product_name AS GoodsName, category, image_url AS imageUrl, price AS GoodsPrice, number AS GoodsNumber, sales_count AS SalesNumber, status, created_time AS createdTime from adminflowers
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select id, product_name AS GoodsName, category, image_url AS imageUrl, price AS GoodsPrice, number AS GoodsNumber, sales_count AS SalesNumber, status, created_time AS createdTime from adminflowers where id=#{id}
